overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a high-quality game engine showing a player walking through a narrow rocky coastal passage at dusk. The player approaches a burning campfire near a metal grate entrance built into the cliffside, with the ocean visible in the background, and stops to observe the surroundings.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow rocky passage toward the distant campfire

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock formation forming the left wall of the passage
tall rock formation with rough texture forming the right wall
burning fire pit with stones arranged around it, visible in the distance
calm sea visible through the gap in the rocks on the left side
horizontal wooden planks spanning across the top of the passage

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow rocky trench at dusk, flanked by tall cliff walls on both sides. A campfire burns in the distance ahead, while the ocean is visible through a gap in the rocks to the left. Wooden beams span overhead as the player advances steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky overhang with campfire and metal grate entrance

events.description: warm orange light from the campfire becomes dominant over the blue dusk ambient lighting
circular metal grate entrance becomes visible embedded in the rock wall to the right

agents.ego_description: approaching the campfire and moving toward the metal grate entrance built into the cliffside

entered.detail: circular metal cage or grate built into the rock wall, possibly a drainage or ventilation opening
large cylindrical metal pipes running along the left side near the water

segments.scene_description: As the player approaches the campfire, the lighting shifts to a warm orange glow. A metal grate entrance becomes visible in the right cliff wall, and industrial pipes line the left side near the ocean. The player moves under a rocky overhang, getting close to the burning fire.

scene_state.functional_zone: campfire site at cliffside with metal grate

events.description: player stops walking and stands near the campfire, looking around the immediate area

agents.ego_description: standing near the campfire, looking down at the flames and surveying the rocky surroundings

segments.scene_description: The player stops at the campfire, now dominated by the warm flickering firelight. Looking around the immediate rocky area, the metal grate entrance is visible further back on the right, while the surrounding cliffs and sparse vegetation frame the scene. The ocean view is no longer visible as the player faces inland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a narrow rocky passage at dusk that culminates in the warm glow of a secluded campfire. It begins with a steady advance through a rocky trench flanked by tall cliffs, passing under overhead wooden beams with the ocean visible through a gap to the left. As the camera approaches the distant fire, the lighting shifts to a warm orange hue, revealing industrial pipes along the coast and a metal grate entrance embedded in the right cliff wall. The scene then moves under a rocky overhang to arrive directly at the burning campfire, where the flickering light dominates the immediate surroundings. Finally, the camera comes to a stop and pans across the rocky area and sparse vegetation, turning away from the sea to face the inland cliffs and the metal grate.
